stemHtml: High altitude flight operations expose flight crew to increased levels of cosmic radiation. The four main factors influencing the level of radiation, in order of their relative importance, are..

options.a: altitude, latitude, normal solar activity, and random solar activity (e.g. solar flares).
options.b: altitude, latitude, solar activity (e.g. solar flares), and height of the ionosphere.
options.c: altitude, airspeed, the Earth’s magnetic field, and solar activity (e.g. solar flares).
options.d: latitude, altitude, space weather (e.g. solar storms), and the Earth’s magnetic field.
